title: Typo in "Error: getting store info: unable to collect graph root usasge "
body:
### Issue Description

There is a minor typo for the word usage (usasge):

`"Error: getting store info: unable to collect graph root usasge ..."`

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue

### Describe the results you expected

### Additional information

Error is in libpod/info.go line 232.
